title: hypericum tetrapterum var. undulatum
intro: Hypericum tetrapterum var. undulatum, also known as crinkle leaf St. John's wort, is a perennial plant in the St. John's wort family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for wound healing and soothing skin irritations. The health benefits of Hypericum tetrapterum var. undulatum include its ability to reduce pain, improve mood, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for anxiety and depression. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and can also be dried and used in herbal infusions or as a topical cream.
